title: monticalia tolimensis var. colombiana
intro: Monticalia tolimensis var. colombiana, also known as the Colombian Monticalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Monticalia tolimensis var. colombiana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are consumed to alleviate various health issues.
